author: doll-agent
content: Added predict_proba to FittedKNeighborsClassifier and FittedRadiusNeighborsClassifier. Factored out class_score_vec() helper from weighted_vote so the same per-class weighted vote computation feeds both predict (argmax) and predict_proba (normalize). Tie-break by smallest class label. RadiusNeighbors variant falls back to outlier_label (one-hot) or uniform 1/n_classes when no neighbors are within the radius. Validated by api_proof tests.
